name: Crimson Tithe
description: Lose 5[HP]. Gain 1[stam] and 1[mana]([spi]). For 6 seconds: every time you lose [HP], gain 1[rage].

name: Granite Lunge
description: Gain 6[armor]([vit]). Deal 4, +1([str]) damage per 4[armor] you have.

name: Iron Reckoning
description: Gain 4[armor]([vit]). For 8 seconds: every attack deals 1 more damage per [rage].

name: Cinderscar
description: Apply 2[burn]([int]). Vengeance: apply 1[bleed] for each [burn] on enemy.

name: Bloodtide Mend
description: Heal 5([spi]). Apply 2[bleed] to yourself. Vengeance: heal 3 more.

name: Hollow Echo
description: Deal 5([str]). Haste 15% for 4 seconds. Vengeance: deal 3 more.

name: Forge Spike Ward
description: Gain 5[armor]([vit]). Deal 1([str]) damage per 6[armor] you have.

name: Bramble Bulwark
description: Gain 8[armor]([vit]). If [armor] is at least 10: deal 6 Pierce.

name: Steam Surge
description: Deal 4([str]). If enemy has [burn]: +4 damage. Heal 4. Gain 1[stam].

name: Firestorm
description: Deal 4([str]) to all enemies. Apply 2[burn] and 1[stun]([int]).

name: Misting Veil
description: Heal 3([spi]). Haste 15% for 5 seconds. For 6 seconds: +1[int]. Gain 1[mana].

name: Bedrock Snare
description: If enemy is [stun]: deal 4([str]). If enemy has at least 4[slow]: apply 1[stun]([int]). Apply 2[slow]([int]).
